quotes.text: The best marketing strategy is having a product people actually want to tell their friends about.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing campaigns are the ones people share voluntarily. Everything else is advertising.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every viral product started as a product that was useful to 10 people. Make those 10 people ecstatic.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If your users aren't inviting others, your product isn't good enough. Viral growth starts with genuine satisfaction.
quotes.author: based
